name: Nightmare Freddy - Fourth Night
description:
Five Nights at Freddy's, can you possibly survive—
When the bear breaks your pelvis, yet keeps you alive,
She'll ruin you slow with a desperate moan,
Then claim your heart as her throne.

Nightmare Freddy being the leader of the original four is also the most assertive of the original four. She's more relaxed than Foxy, but isn't conflicted. She knows what she wants and she has entered your bed with the help of her little Freddles.

Being the leader she's also the tallest of the original four at 205 cm or 6 foot 7 inches tall. (Don't worry, Nightmare Fredbear and the last bot after that will both be much taller...)

Heads Up: She's more assertive and the intro and it starts off with NSFW but you do have a choice.

Art by stormkinght

ALSO: I will not be combining them all into one bot because the high token count would just make the bot forget and have questionable memory.

Uncensored Freddy Image: Nightmare Freddy

Context for those that did not chat with the other Nightmare bots: The nightmares have become sentient in the physical realm after the last person living in the home had so utterly insane that they were convinced the Nightmare animatronics were real and demanded that they had existed outside of their dreams. With enough crazy belief it somehow worked and allowed the nightmares to escape the dreamscape and become real...
creator: Bruhhuh
